title: Matik103/sanctum-runtime
summary: Open-source trust layer for autonomous AI — gate agent, robot, smart home, and industrial actions before they run. Policies, HITL, Ollama/OpenAI, audit. MIT. npm @sanctum-runtime/sdk

title: obeone/ollama-router
summary: Model-aware reverse proxy for multiple Ollama backends with health checks, caching, and Prometheus metrics

title: luongnv89/ccl
summary: Hit your limit? Need privacy? Just swap the model, everything else stays

title: Aseiel/VideoHighlighter
summary: Open-source local AI video analyzer powered by Ollama. Visual search, automatic highlights, scene/action/object detection, audio analysis, and subtitle generation. Free, offline alternative to Twelve Labs, Runway, and Descript.

title: mekedron/ClipSlop
summary: AI writing tool for macOS — fix grammar, translate, rewrite, format text with a hotkey. Chain prompts into pipelines. Works with ChatGPT, Anthropic, Ollama. Free and open-source.

title: bradleybond512/crystal-ball
summary: Tauri 2 desktop intelligence platform — Cesium.js 3D globe, 185 live panels, MCP server for Claude Code, and an explainable algorithm intelligence layer (truth scoring, evidence graph, compound risk, forecast calibration) plus shortage / weather / insights engines. 600+ deterministic tests.

title: laviprog/JobLake
summary: AI-powered lakehouse platform for IT job market analytics

title: Fortemi/fortemi
summary: Self-hosted AI knowledge base with hybrid semantic search (pgvector + FTS + RRF), MCP server, multi-provider LLM inference (Ollama, OpenAI, OpenRouter, llama.cpp), multimodal ingestion (vision, audio transcription, speaker diarization), and knowledge graph. Rust + PostgreSQL.

title: gellsmore-svg/mnemosyne
summary: Local-first graph memory and retrieval layer for LLM interactions, backed by MongoDB and usable from a CLI or web interface.

title: bitsandbots/fileforge
summary: AI-powered file organizer using local Ollama inference

title: askalf/dario
summary: Your Claude Pro/Max subscription in any tool — Cursor, Cline, Aider, Agent SDK — at subscription pricing, not per-token bills. Active overage protection (v4.1), interactive TUI (v4), hourly CC drift detection. One local endpoint.

title: anemoi-ai/Boris
summary: A working AI agent built in C from scratch — no frameworks, no SDK. ReAct loop, tool system, filesystem sandboxing, 200+ tests.

title: ai-action/code-ollama
summary: 🦙 Ollama coding agent that runs in your terminal.

title: bug-ops/zeph
summary: Memory-first Rust AI agent for long-running work. Temporal graph memory, self-learning skills, multi-model cascade routing. Hybrid inference: Ollama · Claude · Gemini · OpenAI · GGUF · TEE. MCP + ACP + A2A. Sub-agents. One binary.

title: layer1labs/specsmith
summary: Applied Epistemic Engineering toolkit · AEE agent sessions · execution profiles · FPGA/HDL governance · tool installer · 50+ CLI commands · Anthropic/OpenAI/Gemini/Ollama

title: LearningCircuit/local-deep-research
summary: ~95% on SimpleQA (e.g. Qwen3.6-27B on a 3090). Supports all local and cloud LLMs (llama.cpp, Ollama, Google, ...). 10+ search engines - arXiv, PubMed, your private documents. Everything Local & Encrypted.

title: mshin77/TextAnalysisR
summary: TextAnalysisR: A text mining workflow tool (R package version 0.1.4)

title: Oolab-labs/patchwork-os
summary: personal AI runtime, local-first. MCP bridge giving Claude Code 170+ tools (LSP, debugger, terminal, git) inside VS Code, Cursor, Windsurf, or JetBrains. Optional Patchwork layer adds YAML recipes, an approval queue, and an oversight dashboard. Your models, your machine, your policy. (Mac & Windows)

title: batalabs/muxd
summary: An open-source AI coding agent that lives in your terminal. Multi-provider, multi-channel, persistent sessions with git-like branching.

title: CosmoGSpacely/sprockets-cogs
summary: Automated second-brain graph; linked bullet-style journal-calendar.
